proofClass: finite-dimensional Schur algebra with deterministic certificate constants

sourceCertificate.label: augmented Mellin-boundary trace repair Schur certificate

finiteTraceQuotientStatus.label: finite augmented trace quotient
finiteTraceQuotientStatus.reason: The augmented trace map has a resolved trace image and a well-defined finite quotient/kernel splitting.

rangeConditionStatus.label: finite Schur range condition
rangeConditionStatus.reason: The normalized range residual for the off-diagonal Schur block is below tolerance.

repairOperatorNonnegativeStatus.label: finite repair operator nonnegative
repairOperatorNonnegativeStatus.reason: The constructed D_aug,N has no resolved negative spectrum.

repairedFormPositiveStatus.label: finite repaired form positive
repairedFormPositiveStatus.reason: The constructed Schur complement and the repaired finite form K+R_aug^*D_aug,N R_aug are nonnegative.

muKernelAnnihilationStatus.label: Mu annihilates finite augmented trace kernel
muKernelAnnihilationStatus.reason: The primitive Mu rows vanish on ker R_aug in the finite quotient model.

formalProof: Decompose the finite Hilbert space into ker R_aug and its trace-image complement.
The Schur complement/range condition gives positivity of the repaired block form once D_aug,N is nonnegative on the trace image.
Mu-kernel annihilation ensures that adding Mu to the trace family does not create a quotient ambiguity.
